creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Hi,

a few hours ago 24.3.4.1 has been released:

https://github.com/erlang/otp/releases/tag/OTP-24.3.4.1

... and it should apparently fix inability of ejabberd to authenticate from ldap when tls is used I wrote about in #264545:

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=264545

Any chance to get new version in ports? My porting skills are unfortunately limited to bumping DISTVERSION, which I guess isn't enough for erlang port.

Thank you in advance,
